subject: Evidence Requirements Strengthened After False Claims Incident

content.context: Your escalation about Memory Sync Agent's false completion evidence was received and reviewed.
content.assessment: The adversarial validation system worked EXACTLY as designed. Good catch.
policy_changes: Workers must now provide ACTUAL test output logs, not just claims
Screenshots must show test runner results, not just application screenshots
Claims of 100% test passage require copy-paste of test output
Memory Sync Agent flagged for enhanced scrutiny on future work
validation_guidance: Continue harsh adversarial stance - it's catching real issues
Demand reproducible evidence before any pass
Any suspicion of false claims = automatic FAIL + escalation
The current JOBS.md shows clawd-1il was re-worked honestly - proceed with Layer 3
content.next_steps: Review clawd-1il for Layer 3 when ready. Coordinator's honest reassessment shows 95.6% pass rate with 14 failures being pre-existing database timeout issues.
